Name: FMaterialInstanceBasePropertyOverrides
Description: Properties from the base material that can be overridden in material instances.

Variables.Name: bOverride_OpacityMaskClipValue
Variables.Description: Enables override of the opacity mask clip value.

Variables.Name: bOverride_BlendMode
Variables.Description: Enables override of the blend mode.

Variables.Name: bOverride_ShadingModel
Variables.Description: Enables override of the shading model.

Variables.Name: bOverride_DitheredLODTransition
Variables.Description: Enables override of the dithered LOD transition property.

Variables.Name: bOverride_CastDynamicShadowAsMasked
Variables.Description: Enables override of whether to shadow using masked opacity on translucent materials.

Variables.Name: bOverride_TwoSided
Variables.Description: Enables override of the two sided property.

Variables.Name: bOverride_UsedWithTranslucentGI
Variables.Description:
[SurfelGI - brainfkli ADD]
	  Indicates that the material and its instances can be affected by GI in translucent blend mode.

Variables.Name: bOverride_ShadingRate
Variables.Description: Enables override of the shading rate.

Variables.Name: OpacityMaskClipValue
Variables.Description: If BlendMode is BLEND_Masked, the surface is not rendered where OpacityMask < OpacityMaskClipValue.

Variables.Name: TwoSided
Variables.Description: Indicates that the material should be rendered without backface culling and the normal should be flipped for backfaces.

Variables.Name: DitheredLODTransition
Variables.Description: Whether the material should support a dithered LOD transition when used with the foliage system.

Variables.Name: bCastDynamicShadowAsMasked
Variables.Description: Whether the material should cast shadows as masked even though it has a translucent blend mode.

Variables.Name: bUsedWithTranslucentGI
Variables.Description:
[SurfelGI - brainfkli ADD]
	  Indicates that the material and its instances can be affected by GI in translucent blend mode.
